title: 26cm Silicone Balloon Whisk, Perfect for Non-Stick Cookware, Milk and Egg Beater Blender, Heat Resistant Kitchen Whisks for Whisking, Cooking, Baking, Beating, Frothing & Stirring (Black)
features: 【FATIGUE-FREE MIXING】THICKENED WIRE & comfy nonslip grip made WHISK can be fatigue-free MIXING. Proper balance between floppy and sturdy. More guaranteed than others.

【GREAT FOR NON-STICK POTS AND PANS】 WHISK have Sturdy Silicone Protective Cover which is non-stick itself and won't scratch the non-stick coating in your Pots and Pans. Easy cleaning after using. Anaeat Whisks are perfect with your cooking ware.
【SOFT, COMFORTABLE, NON-SLIP HANDLE】Innovative ergonomic handle shape and soft, comfortable grip to absorb pressure, Its excellent balance and control, let you really feel the quality .

【HEAT RESISTANT & DURABLE & HEALTHY】Silicones are resistant to heat up to 450 degrees Fahrenheit, making them ideal for cooking almost any favorite food. BPA free silicone design is highly resistant to bacterial growth and stains. WHISK won't discolor, warp or melt.
description: FOR NON-STICK COOKWARE silicone whisk that didn't hold water inside the handle. usually get wet when water ends up in the handle and then they rust and food bits end up in there and rot and smell. whisk is a simple device but everything you were looking for !
